item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: WASHINGTON — Rejecting a Republican National Committee challenge, the Supreme Court ruled Monday that elections officials may count mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day if they were postmarked beforehand

media:content.media:text: Vote by Mail ballots are inspected by a worker who flips through the envelope
media:content.media:description: Vote by Mail ballots are inspected at the Los Angeles County Ballot Processing Center on Nov. 4, 2025 in City of Industry, Calif.

item.title: Supreme Court allows states to count mail-in ballots that arrive late, rejecting RNC challenge

item.description: The Supreme Court is rejecting President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve board member Lisa Cook, but did grant him more power over other independent federal agencies in a separate decision. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the two rulings and how the justices differed in their views of the president's authority.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed member Lisa Cook
media:content.media:description: The Supreme Court is rejecting President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve board member Lisa Cook, but did grant him more power over other independent federal agencies in a separate decision. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the two rulings and how the justices differed in their views of the president's authority.

item.title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed member Lisa Cook

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The Supreme Court refused to hear President Donald Trump’s attempt to overturn a jury's finding that he sexually assaulted and defamed writer E. Jean Carroll.

media:content.media:text: Image: TOPSHOT-US-POLITICS-JUSTICE-TRIAL-TRUMP
media:content.media:description: E. Jean Carroll arrives at Manhattan federal court for the second defamation trial against former President Donald Trump, in Manhattan, on Jan. 17, 2024.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s push to overturn $5 million E. Jean Carroll verdict

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Supreme Court on Monday refused to hear famed law professor and attorney Alan Dershowitz’s defamation claim against CNN, effectively upholding long-standing protections for the news media when reporting on public figures

media:content.media:text: Alan Dershowitz.
media:content.media:description: Famed attorney Alan Dershowitz asked the Supreme Court to revisit the landmark 1964 ruling The New York Times v. Sullivan, but the high court shot him down.

item.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Alan Dershowitz appeal in defamation case

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: In a ruling applying individual constitutional protections to new technology, the Supreme Court on Monday ruled that sweeping use of cell phone location data requires a warrant.

media:content.media:text: An illustration depicting a yellow hand holding a yellow gavel, hitting the top of a red location pin, and the background is a pink overlay of a U.S. map
media:content.media:description: "Geo-fence warrants" allow law enforcement to get broad cell location data, even without a suspect in mind.

item.title: Supreme Court rules that broad cell phone location data sweeps require warrants

item.description: El mediocampista se hizo presente con un contundente remate de cabeza para igualar el marcador en Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:title: Casemiro firma el empate de Brasil frente a Japón con un tremendo remate del mediocampista
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista se hizo presente con un contundente remate de cabeza para igualar el marcador en Houston, Texas.

item.title: Casemiro firma el empate de Brasil frente a Japón con un tremendo remate del mediocampista

item.description: Los aficionados japoneses celebran con gran entusiasmo el gol de Sano que los hace soñar con un mundial histórico para los samuráis.

media:content.media:title: ¡El grito de gol hace eco hasta Tokio! Japón pone el primero en el marcador y los hinchas enloquecen
media:content.media:description: Los aficionados japoneses celebran con gran entusiasmo el gol de Sano que los hace soñar con un mundial histórico para los samuráis.

item.title: ¡El grito de gol hace eco hasta Tokio! Japón pone el primero en el marcador y los hinchas enloquecen

item.description: Una recuperación en el mediocampo permitió a Japón lanzar un contragolpe fulminante que terminó con un gol del futbolista del Mainz.

media:content.media:title: Golazo de Kaishū Sano para adelantar a Japón frente a Brasil
media:content.media:description: Una recuperación en el mediocampo permitió a Japón lanzar un contragolpe fulminante que terminó con un gol del futbolista del Mainz.

item.title: Golazo de Kaishū Sano para adelantar a Japón frente a Brasil

item.description: Damián Bobadilla recuerda cómo nació su sueño de jugar con Paraguay acompañando a su padre, Aldo Bobadilla, a los estadios. Hoy, ambos comparten la emoción de ver cumplido ese anhelo en una Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: De acompañar a su padre al estadio a jugar un Mundial | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Damián Bobadilla recuerda cómo nació su sueño de jugar con Paraguay acompañando a su padre, Aldo Bobadilla, a los estadios. Hoy, ambos comparten la emoción de ver cumplido ese anhelo en una Copa del Mundo.

item.title: De acompañar a su padre al estadio a jugar un Mundial | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Neymar se prepara para un enfrentamiento importante en el que Brasil chocará contra una nueva generación japonesa con ganas de trascender.

media:content.media:title: Neymar calienta motores para enfrentar un duelo decisivo en su carrera con la Canarinha
media:content.media:description: Neymar se prepara para un enfrentamiento importante en el que Brasil chocará contra una nueva generación japonesa con ganas de trascender.

item.title: Neymar calienta motores para enfrentar un duelo decisivo en su carrera con la Canarinha

item.description: Revive la histórica final del Mundial México 1986, cuando Diego Armando Maradona levantó la Copa del Mundo tras el triunfo 3-2 de Argentina sobre Alemania Occidental, en una de las finales más recordadas de la historia.

media:content.media:title: Un día como hoy: Maradona conquistó el mundo | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Revive la histórica final del Mundial México 1986, cuando Diego Armando Maradona levantó la Copa del Mundo tras el triunfo 3-2 de Argentina sobre Alemania Occidental, en una de las finales más recordadas de la historia.

item.title: Un día como hoy: Maradona conquistó el mundo | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Japón llega al corazón de Texas para dar el campanazo en la Copa Mundial, su objetivo es eliminar a la cinco veces campeona, Brasil. Una misión que parece imposible. ¿Lo lograrán?

media:content.media:title: Japón llega a Houston buscando la hazaña ante la Selección de Brasil
media:content.media:description: Japón llega al corazón de Texas para dar el campanazo en la Copa Mundial, su objetivo es eliminar a la cinco veces campeona, Brasil. Una misión que parece imposible. ¿Lo lograrán?

item.title: Japón llega a Houston buscando la hazaña ante la Selección de Brasil

item.description: El líder defensivo, Marquinhos declara las expectativas brasileñas ante Japón y reconoce que llegan en un buen momento para enfrentar la eliminatoria y elogió a su compañero Vinicius Jr.

media:content.media:title: Marquinhos confía en el talento brasileño para conseguir la victoria en dieciseisavos
media:content.media:description: El líder defensivo, Marquinhos declara las expectativas brasileñas ante Japón y reconoce que llegan en un buen momento para enfrentar la eliminatoria y elogió a su compañero Vinicius Jr.

item.title: Marquinhos confía en el talento brasileño para conseguir la victoria en dieciseisavos

item.description: La Canarinha llega a Houston para enfrentar a la Selección de Japón, equipo que ha demostrado que ha crecido a pasos agigantados. Brasil apela a la historia y jogo bonito para derrotarlos.

media:content.media:title: Concentrados: Brasil llega con la mentalidad ganadora para sobrepasar el reto japonés
media:content.media:description: La Canarinha llega a Houston para enfrentar a la Selección de Japón, equipo que ha demostrado que ha crecido a pasos agigantados. Brasil apela a la historia y jogo bonito para derrotarlos.

item.title: Concentrados: Brasil llega con la mentalidad ganadora para sobrepasar el reto japonés

item.description: El técnico italiano habló sobre la estrategia para el partido de dieciseisavos de final, donde enfrentará a un peligroso conjunto asiático en el Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Ancelotti analiza las claves del decisivo choque entre Brasil y Japón en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El técnico italiano habló sobre la estrategia para el partido de dieciseisavos de final, donde enfrentará a un peligroso conjunto asiático en el Mundial 2026.

item.title: Ancelotti analiza las claves del decisivo choque entre Brasil y Japón en el Mundial

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Senate Ethics Committee has dismissed allegations of misconduct by Sen.

media:content.media:text: Sen. Ruben Gallego, D-Ariz.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Ruben Gallego, D-Ariz., conducts a news conference in the U.S. Capitol on June 18.

item.title: Senate Ethics panel dismisses misconduct complaint against Ruben Gallego

item.description: Nearly half the country is on alert for dangerous oppressive temperatures with record highs expected. In the West the hot, dry weather is fueling deadly wildfires, while parts of the South are drying out after catastrophic flash flooding where at least four people died. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the forecast.

media:content.media:title: Deadly Floods, Wildfires and Heat Wave Batter the US
media:content.media:description: Nearly half the country is on alert for dangerous oppressive temperatures with record highs expected. In the West the hot, dry weather is fueling deadly wildfires, while parts of the South are drying out after catastrophic flash flooding where at least four people died. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the forecast.

item.title: Deadly Floods, Wildfires and Heat Wave Batter the US

item.description: Comcast said it plans to spin off the NBCUniversal media empire into a separate publicly traded company, separating it from the corporation’s broadcast and wireless businesses. NBC News' Brian Cheung has the latest details surrounding the planned spinoffs.

media:content.media:title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal into a separate company
media:content.media:description: Comcast said it plans to spin off the NBCUniversal media empire into a separate publicly traded company, separating it from the corporation’s broadcast and wireless businesses. NBC News' Brian Cheung has the latest details surrounding the planned spinoffs.

item.title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal into a separate company

item.description: In Venezuela, round-the-clock rescue missions are racing against time as more than 1,400 people remain unaccounted for following the powerful twin earthquakes that hit near the country’s capital five days ago. It comes as the death toll nears 1,500 and a massive global humanitarian mission takes shape. Telemundo’s Julio Vaqueiro reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Venezuela Quakes: Race for Survivors as Death Toll Hits 1,450
media:content.media:description: In Venezuela, round-the-clock rescue missions are racing against time as more than 1,400 people remain unaccounted for following the powerful twin earthquakes that hit near the country’s capital five days ago. It comes as the death toll nears 1,500 and a massive global humanitarian mission takes shape. Telemundo’s Julio Vaqueiro reports for TODAY.

item.title: Venezuela Quakes: Race for Survivors as Death Toll Hits 1,450

item.description: The United States and Iran appear to have paused hostilities following a weekend of escalating attacks that rocked the Middle East, less than a week after Vice President JD Vance announced both sides had set a foundation for a lasting peace deal. Now, a new round of peace talks appears to be on the table as the war enters its fifth month. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US and Iran Pause Hostilities After Weekend of Escalating Strikes
media:content.media:description: The United States and Iran appear to have paused hostilities following a weekend of escalating attacks that rocked the Middle East, less than a week after Vice President JD Vance announced both sides had set a foundation for a lasting peace deal. Now, a new round of peace talks appears to be on the table as the war enters its fifth month. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

item.title: US and Iran Pause Hostilities After Weekend of Escalating Strikes

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
item.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Bruce Watson sits on the front steps to his house, his dog lays on the path in front of him, and an American flag flies in front of the house
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: A silhouette of the side profile of Dina Bannick at sunset outside
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: A three-way split composite image of left, a face close up of a large wood carving statue of Donald Trump, center, David Cavannah sitting on top of a large log near other logs, and right, a wide view of a large wood carving statue of Donald Trump holding a sign that says "MAGA" with an American flag flying on a pole behind it
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Frank Chappell stands outside holding a blue flag with an insignia showing two horses, an eagle, and a ship in the center crest, text on the bottom on a red ribbon design reads "virtue, liberty, and indepence"
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Rebecca Dyer, stands in front of her home with a hand on her pregnant belly, an American flag can be seen flying in front of the house
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: From left, Rebecca Dyer watches her two sons blowing bubble in their backyard outside
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Bruce Watson stands in front of an American flag
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Close up of two rows of red white and blue stars and tassles hanging from threads
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

item.title: As nation turns 250, many Americans say the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: A JetBlue flight hit a drone while it was trying to land Monday morning at John F. Kennedy International Airport in New York, according to air traffic control audio.

media:content.media:text: A JetBlue Airways Airbus A321 airplane approaches San Diego International Airport
media:content.media:description: A JetBlue airplane approaches San Diego International Airport in 2025.

item.title: JetBlue flight collides with drone in New York

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Supreme Court on Monday refused to hear famed law professor and attorney Alan Dershowitz’s defamation claim against CNN, effectively upholding long-standing protections for the news media when reporting on public figures

media:content.media:text: Alan Dershowitz.
media:content.media:description: Famed attorney Alan Dershowitz asked the Supreme Court to revisit the landmark 1964 ruling The New York Times v. Sullivan, but the high court shot him down.

item.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Alan Dershowitz appeal in defamation case

item.dc:creator: Ava Kelley
David K. Li
item.description: An infant’s remains were found in the restroom of a Michigan music festival on Sunday with investigators appealing the public’s help in solving this disturbing incident, officials said

media:content.media:text: Michigan State Police
media:content.media:description: Michigan State Police

item.title: Body of newborn found in portable restroom at Electric Forest music festival in Michigan
